excerpt: So you're headed to a Pre-Rift event for Spiritforged.
This guide will get you ready to build a real deck, not a pile.
You get six booster packs. You open them, spread out your cards, and build a 40-card deck from what you opened. That's it. No trading, no borrowing, no "I forgot my Fury cards can I use yours?"
Unlike Draft, you're not competing for cards during the pick.
In sealed, bombs—your rares and epics that just end games if unanswered—are king.
**Bomb evaluation checklist:** - Does it win the game if your opponent can't answer it immediately?
If you answered yes to two or more, that's your first-pick card.
Removal spells are the second most important cards in your pool.
**Prioritize unconditional removal.** "Destroy target creature" beats "deal 3 damage" every time.
